leanBoundary: finite cancel-code and pure pending-set membership facts only; real AbortSignal delivery, timers, scheduling, races, and worker lifecycle remain runtime-test boundaries

cancelVectors.name: client-abort-cancel
cancelVectors.purpose: CLIENT_ABORT maps to the abstract cancelled terminal class and AbortError reason

cancelVectors.name: timeout-cancel
cancelVectors.purpose: TIMEOUT maps to the abstract timedOut terminal class and ShirikaTimeoutError reason

cancelVectors.name: client-close-cancel
cancelVectors.purpose: CLIENT_CLOSE maps to the abstract cancelled terminal class and ShirikaClosedError reason

pendingWitnessVectors.name: allocated-fresh-request-id
pendingWitnessVectors.purpose: locally allocated request ids are nonzero and not already pending before insertion
runtimeCoverage: test/node/pending-witness.test.ts allocation returns non-zero UInt32 ids and skips ids already pending

pendingWitnessVectors.name: insert-after-allocation-establishes-witness
pendingWitnessVectors.purpose: PendingRequestId witness exists only after the allocated id has been inserted into the pending set
pendingWitnessVectors.abstractOperation: insertAllocated creates PendingRequestId after map insertion
runtimeCoverage: test/node/pending-witness.test.ts witness is created only for an inserted pending entry

pendingWitnessVectors.name: release-known-pending-removes-one-entry
pendingWitnessVectors.purpose: witness release removes the matching pending entry and leaves other ids unchanged in the abstract model
pendingWitnessVectors.abstractOperation: releaseByWitness consumes a locally owned pending request witness
runtimeCoverage: test/node/pending-witness.test.ts releaseByWitness consumes the pending entry exactly once

pendingWitnessVectors.name: duplicate-release-idempotent
pendingWitnessVectors.purpose: a repeated release of the same abstract request id has no second terminal effect
runtimeCoverage: test/node/pending-witness.test.ts stale witness cannot release a new entry that reused the numeric id

outOfModelRuntimeFallback.name: unknown-cancel-code-runtime-fallback
outOfModelRuntimeFallback.purpose: unknown runtime cancel codes fall back to AbortError but remain outside the finite Lean CancelCode model
